title: Guidance document: Electronic Canadian Drug Facts Table (eCDFT) Technical Standards - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance document: Electronic Canadian Drug Facts Table (eCDFT) Technical Standards
This guidance document  provides direction to sponsors, manufacturers and license holders on the  technical web publication standards for the Electronic Canadian Drug Facts  Table (eCDFT) of non-prescription drugs.

## Who this guide is for
The guide is intended for regulated parties  (industry) who are affected by the regulations.
- 1. Introduction 1.1 Objectives 1.2 Policy Statements 1.3 Scope and Application 1.4 Background
- 1.2 Policy Statements
- 1.3 Scope and Application
- 2. Technical Requirements for Electronic Canadian Drug Fact Table 2.1 Languages 2.2 URL (Uniform Resource Locator) naming conventions 2.3 Use of two-dimensional (2D) barcodes 2.4 Technical approaches for accessing individual eCDFT 2.5 Web Experience Toolkit publication template 2.6 Using a third party
- 2.2 URL (Uniform Resource Locator) naming conventions
- 2.3 Use of two-dimensional (2D) barcodes
- 2.4 Technical approaches for accessing individual eCDFT
- 2.5 Web Experience Toolkit publication template
- 2.6 Using a third party
- 3. Important  accessibility considerations implemented in the wet templates 3.1 Accessibility considerations 3.2 Language of the Page 3.3 Non-text Content 3.4 Sensory Characteristics 3.5 Language of Parts
- 3.1 Accessibility considerations
- 3.2 Language of the Page
- 3.3 Non-text Content
- 3.4 Sensory Characteristics
- 3.5 Language of Parts
- 4. Submission Process
Published: August 01, 2017
Updated: September 28, 2018
Consulted: June 26, 2018
